jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at Simplilearn
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Teacher looking for your next big career move? Simplilearn in Nagpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Simplilearn:
Simplilearn is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Support students with special educational needs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Data Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Simplilearn!
